Title: Order History - View Orders
Preconditions: User has at least one previous order, user logged in
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders
[WAIT] Wait for orders list to load
[ASSERT] Verify orders list rendered
[ASSERT] Verify orders sorted with most recent first
[ASSERT] Verify each order row shows: order number, date, status, total
[ASSERT] Verify at least one order visible
Assertions:
[DOM] Orders list rendered with at least one row
[DOM] Order number, date, status, total shown per row
[STATE] Orders sorted descending by date (most recent first)
[DOM] Link to order detail available per row
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /account/orders returns list with correct fields
[CONSOLE] No errors loading order history
Failure_Signals: Orders list empty when orders exist; orders not sorted correctly

Title: Order History - View Details
Preconditions: At least one order exists in user's history, user logged in
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders
[ACT] click on an existing order to view detail
[WAIT] Wait for order detail page to load
[ASSERT] Verify line items displayed (name, qty, price)
[ASSERT] Verify shipping address section shown
[ASSERT] Verify payment info shown (masked)
[ASSERT] Verify order status shown
[ASSERT] Verify order total breakdown visible
Assertions:
[DOM] Line items with name, quantity, unit price rendered
[DOM] Shipping address section rendered
[DOM] Payment method shown (no full card numbers)
[DOM] Status label visible
[DOM] Subtotal, shipping, tax, grand total shown
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /account/orders/{orderId} returns full order detail
[CONSOLE] No 404 or 500 errors on detail page
Failure_Signals: Order detail page shows no line items; clicking order link results in error page

Title: Order - Pickup Details Display
Preconditions: User has a BOPIS/pickup order in order history, user logged in
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders
[ACT] click on a pickup/BOPIS order to view detail
[ASSERT] Verify pickup location name and address shown
[ASSERT] Verify store hours shown if available
[ASSERT] Verify pickup instructions or ready-for-pickup notification shown
[ASSERT] Verify no shipping address shown (pickup order)
Assertions:
[DOM] Pickup location name and address rendered
[DOM] Store hours section present
[DOM] Pickup instructions text visible
[STATE] No delivery shipping address section shown for pickup order
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /account/orders/{orderId} returns fulfillmentType = pickup
[CONSOLE] No rendering errors for pickup order type
Failure_Signals: Pickup location details missing; delivery address shown instead of pickup info

Title: Order - Delivery Details Display
Preconditions: User has a delivery order in order history, user logged in
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders
[ACT] click on a delivery order to view detail
[ASSERT] Verify shipping address section rendered
[ASSERT] Verify carrier name shown if available
[ASSERT] Verify tracking number shown if order has been shipped
[ASSERT] Verify tracking link clickable for shipped orders
Assertions:
[DOM] Shipping address rendered correctly
[DOM] Carrier name shown if shipment created
[DOM] Tracking number visible for Shipped status orders
[DOM] Tracking link opens carrier website (new tab)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /account/orders/{orderId} returns shipmentDetails with carrier and tracking
[CONSOLE] No errors rendering tracking info
Failure_Signals: Shipping address not shown; tracking link broken or absent for shipped order

Title: Order Status - New
Preconditions: User logged in, order just placed through storefront
Steps:
[NAV] Complete checkout and place order via storefront
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders
[ACT] click on newly placed order
[ASSERT] Verify order status displayed as 'New'
[ASSERT] Verify status visible on both order list row and detail page
[ASSERT] Verify status label matches configured display text
Assertions:
[DOM] Status label = 'New' on order list row
[DOM] Status label = 'New' on order detail page
[STATE] Status visible immediately after order placement without page reload
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /account/orders/{orderId} returns status = New
[CONSOLE] No errors loading order status
Failure_Signals: Status not shown after order placement; status shows wrong value (e.g. Pending instead of New)

Title: Order Status - Processing
Preconditions: Order in New status, admin access available
Test_Data: url={{FRONT_URL}}, admin={{ADMIN_URL}}, admin_user={{ADMIN_EMAIL}}, admin_pass={{ADMIN_PASSWORD}}, user={{USER_EMAIL}}, password={{USER_PASSWORD}}
Steps:
[NAV] Verify order in 'New' status in storefront
[NAV] Navigate to {{ADMIN_URL}}/orders and find the order
[ACT] Update order status to 'Processing' in admin
[WAIT] Wait for admin status update to save
[NAV] Return to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders in storefront
[ACT] Refresh order detail page
[ASSERT] Verify status updated to 'Processing'
[ASSERT] Verify status transition reflected in order history or timeline
Assertions:
[DOM] Status = 'Processing' on order detail page
[STATE] Status update reflected without requiring new login
[DOM] Order history/timeline shows New → Processing transition if timeline visible
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /account/orders/{orderId} returns status = Processing after admin update
[ADMIN] Admin order management page confirms status change saved
[CONSOLE] No errors on status refresh
Failure_Signals: Storefront status not updated after admin change; timeline shows incorrect transition order

Title: Order Status - Shipped with Tracking Number
Preconditions: Order in Processing status, admin access available
Test_Data: url={{FRONT_URL}}, admin={{ADMIN_URL}}, admin_user={{ADMIN_EMAIL}}, admin_pass={{ADMIN_PASSWORD}}, user={{USER_EMAIL}}, password={{USER_PASSWORD}}
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{ADMIN_URL}}/orders and find order in Processing status

[ACT] Add tracking number (e.g. 1Z999AA10123456784) and carrier name
[WAIT] Wait for admin update to save
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders in storefront

[ASSERT] Verify status shows 'Shipped'
[ASSERT] Verify tracking number displayed
[ASSERT] Verify carrier name displayed
[ASSERT] Verify tracking link clickable
Assertions:
[DOM] Status = 'Shipped' on order detail
[DOM] Tracking number visible
[DOM] Carrier name visible
[DOM] Tracking link rendered and opens carrier tracking page
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /account/orders/{orderId} returns status = Shipped with shipmentDetails
[ADMIN] Shipment details saved correctly in admin
[CONSOLE] No errors rendering tracking link
Failure_Signals: Tracking number not shown in storefront after admin update; tracking link broken or absent
Cleanup: No cleanup needed (read-only after admin update)

Title: Order Status - Completed
Preconditions: Order in Shipped status, admin access available
Test_Data: url={{FRONT_URL}}, admin={{ADMIN_URL}}, admin_user={{ADMIN_EMAIL}}, admin_pass={{ADMIN_PASSWORD}}, user={{USER_EMAIL}}, password={{USER_PASSWORD}}
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{ADMIN_URL}}/orders and find order in Shipped status

[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders in storefront
[ACT] Refresh order detail page
[ASSERT] Verify status shows 'Completed'
[ASSERT] Verify no 'Cancel' action available for completed order
[ASSERT] Verify order history reflects Completed status
Assertions:
[DOM] Status = 'Completed' on order detail
[STATE] Cancel order button absent or disabled for completed orders
[STATE] Order history row shows Completed status
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /account/orders/{orderId} returns status = Completed
[ADMIN] Status confirmed as Completed in admin
[CONSOLE] No errors on completed order detail page

Title: Reorder - Add to Cart
Preconditions: User logged in, has at least one completed order in history
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders
[ACT] click on a completed order to view detail
[WAIT] Wait for order detail page to load
[ASSERT] Verify 'Reorder' button visible on order detail page
[ACT] click 'Reorder'
[WAIT] Wait for items to be added to cart
[ASSERT] Verify success notification 'Items added to cart' or equivalent
[ASSERT] Verify cart count badge updates
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] Verify reordered items present in cart with correct quantities
Assertions:
[DOM] 'Reorder' button visible on completed order detail
[STATE] Success notification shown after clicking Reorder
[DOM] Cart count updates after Reorder
[DOM] Cart contains all line items from the reordered order with matching quantities
[STATE] Existing cart items not replaced (items added)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] createOrderFromCart mutation response errors[] is empty
[API] addItemsToCart or equivalent mutation returns success
[CONSOLE] No errors during reorder action
Failure_Signals: Reorder button absent; items not added to cart; cart count not updated after reorder

Title: Reorder - Current Prices
Preconditions: User has completed order placed 30+ days ago with items whose prices may have changed
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders
[ACT] Find older order and note original prices for each item
[ACT] click 'Reorder' on the old order
[WAIT] Wait for items added to cart
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] Verify cart shows current catalog prices (not original order prices)
[ASSERT] Verify no system error if prices have changed
[ASSERT] Verify cart total reflects current pricing
Assertions:
[DOM] Cart item prices match current catalog prices
[STATE] No system error thrown when historical prices differ from current
[MATH] Cart total calculated using current prices
[DOM] Cart functional and can proceed to checkout
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] createOrderFromCart mutation response errors[] is empty
[API] Product price API returns current prices
[CONSOLE] No errors on price mismatch between historical and current
Failure_Signals: Cart shows historical prices from original order; system error when price differs; cart total using wrong price

Title: Reorder - Partial Availability
Preconditions: User has completed order containing at least one discontinued product
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders
[ACT] Find order containing at least one discontinued product
[ACT] click 'Reorder'
[WAIT] Wait for reorder processing
[ASSERT] Verify notification about unavailable items shown (e.g. 'Some items are no longer available: [Product Name]')
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] Verify available items from order present in cart
[ASSERT] Verify discontinued item NOT in cart
[ASSERT] Verify cart functional with available items only
Assertions:
[API] createOrderFromCart mutation response errors[] is empty
[DOM] Warning/notification lists unavailable items by name
[DOM] Available items added to cart
[STATE] Discontinued item absent from cart
[STATE] Cart functional and can proceed to checkout
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] Reorder API response includes unavailableItems list
[CONSOLE] No unhandled errors when product discontinued
[NETWORK] No 404 errors for available products
Failure_Signals: Discontinued item silently skipped without notification; available items not added; cart broken after partial reorder

Title: Reorder - Out of Stock Item
Preconditions: User has completed order containing a currently out-of-stock product
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders
[ACT] Find order containing out-of-stock product
[ACT] click 'Reorder'
[WAIT] Wait for reorder processing
[ASSERT] Verify out-of-stock item either not added (with notification) or added with 'Out of Stock' warning
[ASSERT] Verify notification or warning shown about out-of-stock item
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] Verify available items from order present in cart
[ASSERT] Verify cart functional for proceeding to checkout
Assertions:
[API] createOrderFromCart mutation response errors[] is empty
[STATE] Out-of-stock item either absent from cart or shows Out of Stock warning
[DOM] Notification shown about out-of-stock item
[DOM] Available items present in cart
[STATE] Cart functional with available items
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] Inventory check during reorder returns out-of-stock status
[CONSOLE] No unhandled exceptions for out-of-stock during reorder
[NETWORK] No unexpected 500 errors
Failure_Signals: Out-of-stock item silently added to cart as if available; no notification about stock issue; cart broken

Title: Billing Address Persists in Order Detail
Preconditions: Order completed with different billing and shipping addresses, user on confirmation or in order history
Steps:
[NAV] Place order with different billing and shipping addresses (use CHK-043 setup)
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders
[ACT] click on the just-placed order to view detail
[ASSERT] Locate billing address section on order detail
[ASSERT] Verify billing address labeled 'Bill To' or equivalent
[ASSERT] Verify shipping address labeled 'Ship To' or equivalent
[ASSERT] Verify both addresses shown distinctly and match what was entered
Assertions:
[DOM] Billing address section rendered on order detail
[DOM] Shipping address section rendered on order detail
[STATE] Billing address matches address entered at checkout
[STATE] Shipping address matches shipping address from checkout
[DOM] Both addresses clearly labeled and not conflated
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /account/orders/{orderId} returns both shippingAddress and billingAddress fields
[CONSOLE] No errors rendering dual addresses on order detail
Failure_Signals: Billing address absent from order detail; billing and shipping addresses identical despite entering different ones
Cleanup: Cancel or archive order if needed

Title: Invoice Download Button
Preconditions: User logged in, has at least one completed or shipped order
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders
[ACT] click on a completed or shipped order to view detail
[WAIT] Wait for order detail page to load
[ASSERT] Verify 'Download Invoice' button or link visible on detail page
[ASSERT] Verify button is clearly labeled and accessible
[ACT] click 'Download Invoice'
[WAIT] Wait for PDF download or new tab to open
[ASSERT] Verify PDF download starts or PDF opens in new tab
Assertions:
[DOM] 'Download Invoice' button visible on completed/shipped order detail
[DOM] Button clearly labeled (not generic or unlabeled icon)
[STATE] Clicking button triggers PDF download or opens PDF in new tab
[DOM] Button accessible without additional navigation or login step
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] No errors when clicking download invoice
[NETWORK] PDF download request returns 200 (not 404 or 500)
Failure_Signals: Download Invoice button absent on completed order; button visible but clicking produces no action or 404 error

Title: Invoice PDF Content
Preconditions: Completed order with Download Invoice button available, user on order detail page
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to completed order detail at {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders
[ACT] click 'Download Invoice'
[WAIT] Wait for PDF to download
[ACT] Open downloaded PDF file
[ASSERT] Verify PDF renders without error
[ASSERT] Verify line items present: product name, SKU, quantity, unit price, line total
[ASSERT] Verify subtotal, shipping cost, tax, and grand total shown
[ASSERT] Verify Ship To address section present
[ASSERT] Verify Bill To address section present
[ASSERT] Verify company/store name and contact info present
[ASSERT] Verify order number and order date visible
[ASSERT] Verify no placeholder text ('Lorem ipsum' etc) in PDF
Assertions:
[DOM] PDF renders without error (no blank or corrupt file)
[DOM] All line items shown with name/SKU/qty/unit price/total
[MATH] Grand total = subtotal + shipping + tax
[FORMAT] Ship To address section present
[FORMAT] Bill To address section present
[FORMAT] Store name/logo/contact info present
[DOM] Order number and date visible
[DOM] No placeholder or template text in PDF
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] PDF file download returns valid PDF MIME type
[CONSOLE] No errors initiating download
Failure_Signals: PDF is blank or corrupt; missing line items; totals incorrect; Ship To or Bill To address absent; placeholder text in PDF

Title: Invoice Not Available for Pending Orders
Preconditions: User logged in, has at least one order with Pending or Processing status
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders
[ACT] Find order with 'Pending' or 'Processing' status and click to view detail
[WAIT] Wait for order detail to load
[ASSERT] Verify 'Download Invoice' button is absent or disabled for pending/processing order
[ACT] If button is shown, click it
[ASSERT] Verify message 'Invoice not yet available' or equivalent shown (not a system error)
[ASSERT] Verify no error thrown when attempting invoice access for pending order
Assertions:
[DOM] Download Invoice button absent or disabled for Pending/Processing orders
[STATE] If button present, clicking shows informational message (not 500 error)
[STATE] No exception or system error when attempting to access invoice for non-eligible order
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /orders/{orderId}/invoice returns 404 or informational response for pending orders (not 500)
[CONSOLE] No unhandled exceptions when invoice not available
Failure_Signals: Download Invoice button shown and functional for pending orders; clicking invoice on pending order returns 500 error instead of informational message

Title: Reorder - All Items Added to Cart at Current Prices
Preconditions: Logged in as buyer ({{USER_EMAIL}}) with at least one completed order in history; all ordered items still available in catalog at current prices
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to /account/orders; [ASSERT] locate a completed order with multiple items; [KEY] note original item prices and quantities from order detail; [ACT] click 'Reorder' on the completed order; [WAIT] wait for cart page to load; [ASSERT] verify all original items now in cart; [ASSERT] verify quantities match original order quantities; [ASSERT] verify prices reflect current catalog prices not historical order prices; [ASSERT] verify success notification confirms items added
Assertions: [DOM] all items from original order present in cart after reorder; [MATH] quantities in cart = original order quantities for each line item; [STATE] cart prices = current catalog prices (verify at least one price matches live catalog); [DOM] success notification visible after reorder action; [DOM] cart subtotal calculated using current prices
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] reorder mutation response contains all expected line items; [CONSOLE] no errors on cart page after reorder; [NETWORK] 2xx on add-to-cart requests
Failure_Signals: not all items added to cart after reorder; quantities defaulted to 1 instead of original values; historical order prices used instead of current catalog prices

Title: Reorder - Discontinued Item Handled Gracefully
Preconditions: Logged in as buyer ({{USER_EMAIL}}) with a completed order containing at least one discontinued/unavailable product and at least one currently available product
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to /account/orders; [ASSERT] locate order containing discontinued product; [ACT] click 'Reorder'; [WAIT] wait for cart page to load; [ASSERT] verify available items added to cart; [ASSERT] verify discontinued item NOT present in cart; [ASSERT] verify warning message identifies which item(s) could not be added; [ASSERT] verify warning specifies reason (e.g. product no longer available); [ASSERT] verify cart is functional with available items only
Assertions: [DOM] available items present in cart after reorder; [STATE] discontinued item absent from cart line items; [DOM] warning/notification message lists the unavailable item by name or SKU; [DOM] cart proceed-to-checkout remains functional with available items; [DOM] user not blocked from continuing with partial cart
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] reorder mutation response includes unavailable_items or partial_result field; [CONSOLE] no unhandled JS exceptions on cart page with partial reorder; [NETWORK] check for any 404s on discontinued product catalog endpoints
Failure_Signals: reorder silently drops all items including available ones; no warning shown for discontinued item; discontinued item added to cart causing downstream errors; cart blocked for all items due to one unavailable item

Title: Reorder - Quantities Match Original Order
Preconditions: Logged in as buyer ({{USER_EMAIL}}) with a completed order containing items with varied quantities (e.g. Product A qty 2; Product B qty 5)
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to /account/orders; [ACT] click on target order to open detail; [KEY] record each line item SKU and quantity (e.g. Product A = 2; Product B = 5); [ACT] click 'Reorder'; [WAIT] wait for cart page; [ASSERT] verify Product A quantity in cart = 2; [ASSERT] verify Product B quantity in cart = 5; [ASSERT] verify no item defaulted to quantity 1 instead of original value; [MATH] verify cart subtotal = sum of (current unit price × original quantity) for all lines
Assertions: [DOM] each reordered item present in cart; [MATH] qty per cart line = original order qty for that SKU; [MATH] cart subtotal reflects correct quantities multiplied by current prices; [STATE] no cart line item shows qty = 1 when original order qty was greater than 1
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] reorder mutation response line items include correct quantity values; [CONSOLE] no errors processing quantity mapping in cart
Failure_Signals: any item quantity defaults to 1 instead of original order quantity; item count in cart differs from original order line count; cart subtotal inconsistent with quantities × current prices

Title: Order Status - New Order Shows Correct Status
Preconditions: Buyer logged in as {{USER_EMAIL}}; able to complete checkout and place a new order; payment method available
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to storefront and add item to cart; [ACT] proceed through checkout; [ACT] place order; [WAIT] wait for order confirmation page; [KEY] note order number from confirmation; [NAV] navigate to /account/orders; [ASSERT] find newly placed order in list; [ACT] click order to view detail; [ASSERT] verify order status = 'New'; [ASSERT] verify order date = today's date; [ASSERT] verify all order details complete (items, quantities, prices, shipping address)
Assertions: [STATE] order status = 'New' immediately after placement; [DOM] order visible in /account/orders list; [FORMAT] order date matches today's date (YYYY-MM-DD format); [DOM] order detail page shows all items, quantities, shipping, and payment summary; [DOM] order number on detail matches confirmation page
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] GET orders list includes new order with status New; [CONSOLE] no errors loading order history after placement
Failure_Signals: newly placed order absent from /account/orders list; status shows incorrect value (e.g. Processing before admin action); order date missing or incorrect; order detail missing line items
Cleanup: none — order is read-only after placement

Title: Order Status - Admin Ships Order With Tracking
Preconditions: Order exists in 'New' status placed by {{USER_EMAIL}}; admin credentials {{ADMIN_EMAIL}} / {{ADMIN_PASSWORD}} available; admin can access {{ADMIN_URL}}
Steps: [ADMIN] Log in to Admin SPA at {{ADMIN_URL}}; [NAV] navigate to Orders; [ACT] find target order by order number; [ACT] update order status to 'Shipped'; [ACT] enter tracking number {{TRACKING_NUMBER}} in tracking field; [ACT] save changes; [ASSERT] verify admin save succeeded (no error messages); [NAV] return to storefront at {{FRONT_URL}} and log in as {{USER_EMAIL}}; [NAV] navigate to /account/orders; [ASSERT] find order in list showing 'Shipped' status; [ACT] click order to view detail; [ASSERT] verify status = 'Shipped' on detail page; [ASSERT] verify tracking number {{TRACKING_NUMBER}} displayed; [ASSERT] verify tracking number is a clickable link
Assertions: [ADMIN] admin save completes without error; [STATE] order status = 'Shipped' in storefront list and detail after admin update; [DOM] tracking number {{TRACKING_NUMBER}} visible on order detail; [DOM] tracking number rendered as clickable link; [DOM] status history may show New → Shipped transition
Cross_Layer_Checks: [ADMIN] verify admin Orders list shows Shipped status for the order; [API] GET order detail returns status=Shipped and tracking_number field; [CONSOLE] no errors on storefront order detail page after admin status update
Failure_Signals: admin save fails silently and status not updated; storefront still shows 'New' after admin ships; tracking number absent from order detail; tracking number displayed as plain text not a link
Cleanup: none — status update is intentional test action

Title: Order Status Filter - Filter by Shipped
Preconditions: Buyer logged in as {{USER_EMAIL}}; account has multiple orders in different statuses including at least one 'Shipped' and at least one in another status
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to /account/orders; [ASSERT] verify status filter dropdown or control visible; [ACT] select 'Shipped' from status filter; [WAIT] wait for filtered results to load; [ASSERT] verify all displayed orders have status 'Shipped'; [ASSERT] verify no orders with other statuses appear; [ASSERT] verify order count updates to reflect filtered set; [ACT] clear or reset filter; [WAIT] wait for full list to reload; [ASSERT] verify all orders shown again with no active filter
Assertions: [DOM] status filter control present on /account/orders page; [STATE] all visible orders show 'Shipped' status after filter applied; [STATE] orders with New/Processing/Completed statuses absent from filtered view; [DOM] order count updates after filter; [STATE] clearing filter restores full order list; [DOM] no page errors or blank state after filter interaction
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] filtered orders query scoped to status=Shipped; [CONSOLE] no JS errors on filter interaction; [NETWORK] 2xx on filtered orders request
Failure_Signals: status filter control absent from orders page; filter shows orders with non-Shipped statuses; clearing filter does not restore full list; page throws error on filter selection

Title: Reorder into Non-Empty Cart - Items Merge
Preconditions: Buyer logged in as {{USER_EMAIL}}; cart already contains at least one item (Item A, qty 1); at least one completed order exists in /account/orders; the completed order contains Item A (same SKU as cart item) plus at least one other item
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to a product page for {{TEST_SKU}} and add qty 1 to cart; [WAIT] wait for cart badge to update; [KEY] note Item A SKU and current cart quantity = 1; [NAV] navigate to /account/orders; [ACT] locate completed order containing Item A and at least one other item; [ACT] click 'Reorder' on that order; [WAIT] wait for cart page to load; [ASSERT] verify Item A quantity in cart = original order qty + 1 (merged, not duplicate line); [ASSERT] verify no duplicate line items exist for Item A SKU; [ASSERT] verify other order items also present in cart; [ASSERT] verify success notification shown
Assertions: [DOM] cart contains exactly one line per SKU — no duplicate rows for Item A; [MATH] Item A qty in cart = pre-existing qty (1) + reorder qty from completed order; [DOM] all other reordered items present as separate line items; [STATE] cart item count reflects merged total not additive count; [DOM] success or reorder confirmation message visible
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] reorder mutation response — verify no duplicate SKU entries in returned cart lines; [CONSOLE] no JS errors on cart page after merge; [NETWORK] 2xx on reorder request
Failure_Signals: Item A appears as two separate line items in cart (duplication bug); Item A quantity shows only the reorder quantity ignoring pre-existing qty; cart cleared before reorder items added; success notification absent

Title: Reorder into Cart with Items from Same Org - Merge Behavior Verified
Preconditions: Buyer logged in as {{USER_EMAIL}}; cart already contains items from the same store/org; completed order exists from same store/org; some SKUs overlap between cart and order
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to storefront and add 2 distinct products to cart (Product X qty 2, Product Y qty 1); [KEY] note SKUs and quantities; [NAV] navigate to /account/orders; [ACT] locate a completed order containing Product X (same SKU) and Product Z (not in cart); [ACT] click 'Reorder'; [WAIT] wait for cart page to load; [ASSERT] verify Product X quantity incremented (not duplicated) to 2 + original order qty for X; [ASSERT] verify Product Y still present with qty 1 unchanged; [ASSERT] verify Product Z added from reorder; [ASSERT] verify cart total line count = 3 (X, Y, Z) not 4
Assertions: [DOM] exactly 3 cart line items — no duplicate rows; [MATH] Product X qty = cart qty (2) + reorder qty; [STATE] Product Y qty unchanged at 1; [DOM] Product Z present from reorder; [MATH] cart subtotal = sum of all 3 line items at current catalog prices; [STATE] no items lost from pre-existing cart during reorder merge
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] cart query after reorder returns 3 distinct line items; [CONSOLE] no merge errors or warnings in console; [NETWORK] no 4xx on cart update requests
Failure_Signals: pre-existing cart items lost when reorder executes; Product X duplicated as two rows; Product Y quantity altered by reorder; cart total incorrect after merge

Title: Return Request - Submit with Reason
Preconditions: Buyer logged in as {{USER_EMAIL}}; at least one completed/delivered order exists in /account/orders; return/RMA feature enabled for the store
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to /account/orders; [ACT] click on a completed order to open detail page; [ASSERT] verify 'Return' or 'Request Return' button visible on order detail; [ACT] click 'Return' / 'Request Return'; [WAIT] wait for return form or modal to load; [ASSERT] verify return form lists all order line items with checkboxes; [ACT] select all items to return; [ACT] select or enter return reason (e.g. 'Defective product'); [ACT] click submit/confirm return request; [WAIT] wait for confirmation response; [ASSERT] verify confirmation message or success notification shown; [ASSERT] verify return request status visible on order detail page
Assertions: [DOM] 'Return' or 'Request Return' button present on completed order detail; [DOM] return form lists all order line items with selection mechanism; [DOM] return reason field present and required; [STATE] confirmation message shown after successful submission; [STATE] return request status or badge visible on order detail after submission; [DOM] return reference number or ID shown in confirmation
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] POST return/RMA mutation — response errors[] is empty; [CONSOLE] no JS errors on return form submission; [NETWORK] 2xx on return request endpoint
Failure_Signals: 'Return' button absent on completed order; return form missing line items; reason field missing or not required; no confirmation shown after submission; order detail not updated with return status
Cleanup: none — return request is intentional test action

Title: Return Request - Partial Return
Preconditions: Buyer logged in as {{USER_EMAIL}}; completed order exists with at least 2 line items; return/RMA feature enabled
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to /account/orders; [ACT] click on completed order with 2+ line items; [KEY] note all line items (Item A and Item B); [ASSERT] verify 'Return' or 'Request Return' button visible; [ACT] click 'Return'; [WAIT] wait for return form; [ASSERT] verify both Item A and Item B shown in return form with checkboxes; [ACT] select only Item A (deselect Item B); [ACT] enter return reason; [ACT] submit return request; [WAIT] wait for confirmation; [ASSERT] verify confirmation message shown; [ASSERT] verify return request lists only Item A; [ASSERT] verify Item B NOT included in return request; [NAV] navigate back to order detail; [ASSERT] verify partial return status or badge shown on order
Assertions: [DOM] each line item in return form individually selectable; [STATE] only selected items (Item A) appear in submitted return request; [STATE] unselected item (Item B) absent from return request; [DOM] confirmation message references Item A specifically or shows partial return; [STATE] order detail reflects partial return in progress; [DOM] return form prevents submission with zero items selected
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] POST return mutation payload includes only selected line item IDs; [CONSOLE] no JS errors on partial selection; [NETWORK] 2xx on partial return request
Failure_Signals: return form lacks individual item selection (all-or-nothing only); deselected Item B included in return request anyway; submit allowed with no items selected; order detail not updated after partial return submission

Title: Order Cancellation - Cancel New Order
Preconditions: Buyer logged in as {{USER_EMAIL}}; at least one order exists in 'New' status; cancellation by buyer is enabled for the store
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to /account/orders; [ACT] click on an order with status 'New'; [WAIT] wait for order detail page; [ASSERT] verify 'Cancel Order' button visible on detail page; [ACT] click 'Cancel Order'; [WAIT] wait for cancellation confirmation dialog; [ASSERT] verify confirmation dialog appears with cancel reason field; [ACT] enter cancellation reason (e.g. 'Changed my mind'); [ACT] confirm cancellation in dialog; [WAIT] wait for status update; [ASSERT] verify order status changes to 'Cancelled'; [ASSERT] verify cancellation reason visible on order detail; [NAV] navigate back to /account/orders list; [ASSERT] verify order shows 'Cancelled' status in list
Assertions: [DOM] 'Cancel Order' button present on 'New' status order detail; [DOM] confirmation dialog shown before committing cancellation; [DOM] cancellation reason text field present in dialog; [STATE] order status = 'Cancelled' after confirmation; [DOM] cancellation reason text visible on order detail page; [STATE] order shows 'Cancelled' in /account/orders list
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] POST cancelOrder mutation — response errors[] is empty; [CONSOLE] no errors during cancellation flow; [NETWORK] 2xx on cancel order endpoint
Failure_Signals: 'Cancel Order' button absent on New order; confirmation dialog not shown before cancellation; reason field missing in dialog; status remains 'New' after cancellation confirmed; cancellation reason not stored or not displayed

Title: Order Cancellation - Cancel Button Absent on Shipped Order
Preconditions: Buyer logged in as {{USER_EMAIL}}; at least one order exists in 'Shipped' status
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to /account/orders; [ACT] click on an order with status 'Shipped'; [WAIT] wait for order detail page; [ASSERT] verify 'Cancel Order' button is NOT present on the page; [ASSERT] verify no cancellation option available in any action menu or dropdown; [ASSERT] verify page loads without JS errors; [ASSERT] verify other order actions (e.g. Reorder, view tracking) are still accessible
Assertions: [DOM] 'Cancel Order' button absent on Shipped order detail page; [DOM] no cancellation option in any contextual menu or action dropdown; [STATE] order status reads 'Shipped' correctly; [DOM] page renders completely without placeholder or error state; [DOM] Reorder and other available actions still functional
Cross_Layer_Checks: [CONSOLE] no JS errors on Shipped order detail page; [NETWORK] no unexpected 4xx/5xx requests when loading Shipped order detail
Failure_Signals: 'Cancel Order' button present on Shipped order (cancellation should be blocked at this status); page errors when loading Shipped order detail; order status incorrectly displayed

Title: Order Confirmation Page - Full Details Shown
Preconditions: Buyer logged in as {{USER_EMAIL}}; able to place a new order; payment method and shipping address configured
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to storefront; [ACT] add item to cart; [ACT] proceed through checkout steps; [ACT] place order; [WAIT] wait for order confirmation page to load; [ASSERT] verify order number displayed on confirmation page; [ASSERT] verify ordered items shown with product name and quantity; [ASSERT] verify unit price and line total for each item; [ASSERT] verify order total (subtotal, shipping, taxes, grand total); [ASSERT] verify shipping address shown as entered during checkout; [ASSERT] verify estimated delivery date or shipping method displayed; [ASSERT] verify 'Continue Shopping' or 'View Order' link present
Assertions: [DOM] order number visible on confirmation page (format matches /account/orders order ID); [DOM] all ordered items listed with product name and qty; [MATH] line totals = unit price × qty; [MATH] grand total = subtotal + shipping + taxes; [FORMAT] shipping address matches address entered at checkout; [DOM] shipping method or estimated delivery shown; [DOM] 'Continue Shopping' or 'View Order' action link present and functional; [NAV] 'View Order' link navigates to correct order detail in /account/orders

Failure_Signals: confirmation page shows no order number; ordered items absent from confirmation; totals absent or mathematically incorrect; shipping address missing; no action links on confirmation page

Title: Invoice PDF Download from Order Detail
Preconditions: Buyer logged in as {{USER_EMAIL}}; at least one completed order exists with invoice/PDF download feature enabled for the store
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to /account/orders; [ACT] click on a completed order to open detail; [ASSERT] verify 'Download Invoice' or 'Invoice' button/link visible on order detail page; [ACT] click 'Download Invoice'; [WAIT] wait for download to initiate; [ASSERT] verify file download begins (browser download prompt or file saved); [ASSERT] verify downloaded file has .pdf extension; [ASSERT] verify downloaded file is non-empty (file size > 0 bytes); [ASSERT] verify no error message shown during or after download attempt

Failure_Signals: 'Download Invoice' button absent on completed order; clicking button shows error message instead of downloading; downloaded file is 0 bytes or corrupted; file extension is not .pdf

Steps: [ADMIN] Log in to Admin SPA at {{ADMIN_URL}}; [NAV] navigate to Orders module; [ACT] find target order by order number; [ACT] change order status from 'New' to 'Processing'; [ACT] save the status change; [ASSERT] verify admin save succeeds without error; [NAV] switch to storefront at {{FRONT_URL}} as {{USER_EMAIL}}; [NAV] navigate to /account/orders; [ASSERT] find the target order in list; [ASSERT] verify order list shows 'Processing' status for that order; [ACT] click order to open detail; [ASSERT] verify order detail page shows status = 'Processing'; [ASSERT] verify status history or timeline shows transition from New to Processing

Cross_Layer_Checks: [ADMIN] verify admin Orders list reflects Processing status; [API] GET order detail returns status=Processing; [CONSOLE] no errors on storefront order detail after admin status change
Failure_Signals: admin save fails silently; storefront still shows 'New' after admin sets Processing; order detail shows incorrect intermediate status; status history absent or shows incorrect transition

Title: Reorder - Product Discontinued Mid-Catalog Shows Error
Preconditions: Buyer logged in as {{USER_EMAIL}}; completed order exists where at least one item is now discontinued or removed from catalog entirely
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to /account/orders; [ACT] find order containing a discontinued product; [ACT] click 'Reorder'; [WAIT] wait for response; [ASSERT] verify error message or warning notification identifies the unavailable item by name; [ASSERT] verify available items from the same order are added to cart; [ASSERT] verify cart is functional despite the partial reorder; [ASSERT] verify no silent failure (empty cart without explanation)
Assertions: [DOM] warning/error message names the discontinued product; [STATE] available items present in cart; [STATE] discontinued item absent from cart; [DOM] no silent failure — user explicitly informed; [DOM] cart checkout button functional with available items only
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] reorder mutation response includes error or unavailable_items field; [CONSOLE] no unhandled exceptions; [NETWORK] no 500 errors on reorder request
Failure_Signals: all items silently dropped including available ones; no error message shown; cart empty with no explanation; discontinued item added to cart causing checkout failure

Title: Reorder - Price Changed Since Original Order
Preconditions: Buyer logged in as {{USER_EMAIL}}; completed order exists where at least one item current catalog price differs from historical order price
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to /account/orders; [ACT] click on order to view detail; [KEY] note historical unit price for items; [ACT] click 'Reorder'; [WAIT] wait for cart page to load; [ASSERT] verify items added to cart at current catalog prices (not historical prices); [ASSERT] verify user is informed or can see that prices may have changed; [ASSERT] verify cart subtotal uses current prices; [MATH] verify cart line totals = current unit price x original quantity
Assertions: [STATE] cart prices = current catalog prices not historical order prices; [MATH] line total = current unit price x quantity from original order; [DOM] no price mismatch between cart display and actual current price; [STATE] user not charged historical price; [DOM] optional: price change indicator or note visible
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] cart query shows current prices not order-time prices; [CONSOLE] no pricing errors in console; [NETWORK] 2xx on reorder and cart requests
Failure_Signals: cart shows historical order prices instead of current; line totals calculated from old prices; no indication prices have changed; subtotal uses mixed old/new prices

Title: Reorder - Partial Availability with Mixed Items
Preconditions: Buyer logged in as {{USER_EMAIL}}; completed order has 3 items: Item A (available and in stock) and Item B (available but out of stock) and Item C (discontinued)
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to /account/orders; [ACT] find order with mixed-availability items; [ACT] click 'Reorder'; [WAIT] wait for response; [ASSERT] verify Item A added to cart successfully; [ASSERT] verify Item B handled with out-of-stock notification; [ASSERT] verify Item C identified as discontinued; [ASSERT] verify summary message lists each unavailable item and reason; [ASSERT] verify cart contains only Item A and is functional for checkout
Assertions: [DOM] Item A present in cart; [STATE] Item B not in cart with out-of-stock reason; [STATE] Item C not in cart with discontinued reason; [DOM] summary notification differentiates between out-of-stock and discontinued; [DOM] cart functional for checkout with available items only
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] reorder response includes per-item status (available or out_of_stock or discontinued); [CONSOLE] no unhandled exceptions; [NETWORK] 2xx on reorder request
Failure_Signals: all items silently dropped; no differentiation between out-of-stock and discontinued; cart non-functional after partial reorder; user not informed which items failed

Title: Return - Reason Selection Required
Preconditions: Buyer logged in as {{USER_EMAIL}}; completed/delivered order exists; return feature enabled
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to /account/orders; [ACT] click on a delivered order; [ACT] click 'Return' or 'Request Return'; [WAIT] wait for return form; [ASSERT] verify return reason dropdown or selection present; [ASSERT] verify predefined reason options available (e.g. Defective and Wrong Item and Changed Mind); [ACT] attempt to submit return without selecting a reason; [ASSERT] verify validation error prevents submission; [ACT] select a reason from dropdown; [ACT] submit return request; [ASSERT] verify submission succeeds with selected reason
Assertions: [DOM] reason selection control present and required; [DOM] predefined reason options available in dropdown; [STATE] submission blocked without reason selection — validation error shown; [STATE] submission succeeds after selecting a valid reason; [DOM] selected reason visible in confirmation
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] return mutation payload includes reason field; [CONSOLE] no errors on reason validation; [NETWORK] 2xx on return submission with reason
Failure_Signals: reason selection absent from return form; return accepted without any reason; dropdown has no predefined options; validation does not fire on empty reason

Title: Return - Status Tracking Display
Preconditions: Buyer logged in as {{USER_EMAIL}}; return request previously submitted for an order; return has been acknowledged by admin
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to /account/orders; [ACT] click on order with active return request; [WAIT] wait for detail page; [ASSERT] verify return status section or badge visible on order detail; [ASSERT] verify return status shows current state (e.g. 'Return Requested' or 'Return Approved' or 'Return Received'); [ASSERT] verify return reference number or RMA ID displayed; [ASSERT] verify return items listed with quantities being returned; [NAV] navigate to returns section (if separate /account/returns page exists); [ASSERT] verify return appears in returns list if such page exists
Assertions: [DOM] return status visible on order detail page; [STATE] return status reflects current state accurately; [DOM] RMA ID or return reference number displayed; [DOM] returned items listed with correct quantities; [DOM] return status badge visually distinct from order status
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] GET order detail includes return/RMA status data; [CONSOLE] no errors rendering return status section; [NETWORK] 2xx on order detail with return data
Failure_Signals: return status absent from order detail; RMA ID missing; returned items not listed; return status shows stale/incorrect state

Title: Return - Partial Return Quantity Selection
Preconditions: Buyer logged in as {{USER_EMAIL}}; delivered order has line item with quantity >= 3; return feature enabled
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to /account/orders; [ACT] click on delivered order with item qty >= 3; [ACT] click 'Return'; [WAIT] wait for return form; [ASSERT] verify quantity field per line item allows entering a value less than ordered qty; [ACT] set return quantity to 1 (out of 3 ordered); [ACT] select return reason; [ACT] submit return; [WAIT] wait for confirmation; [ASSERT] verify return request shows quantity 1 and not full quantity 3; [ASSERT] verify remaining quantity (2) not included in return
Assertions: [DOM] quantity field editable per line item in return form; [STATE] return quantity accepts partial value less than ordered qty; [STATE] submitted return shows qty = 1 for the item; [STATE] full order qty not used when partial specified; [DOM] return confirmation reflects partial quantity
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] return mutation payload includes qty=1 for the item; [CONSOLE] no errors on partial quantity; [NETWORK] 2xx on partial return submission
Failure_Signals: quantity field does not allow partial return (forced to full qty); return created with full quantity despite entering partial; quantity field rejects values less than ordered qty

Title: Return - Window Expiry Enforcement
Preconditions: Buyer logged in as {{USER_EMAIL}}; order exists that was delivered beyond the return window (e.g. 30+ days ago); return window policy configured for the store
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to /account/orders; [ACT] click on order delivered beyond return window; [WAIT] wait for detail page; [ASSERT] verify 'Return' button is either absent or disabled; [ASSERT] verify message indicates return window has expired (e.g. 'Return period has ended'); [ASSERT] verify no way to initiate return request for expired order; [ACT] if button visible but disabled then attempt to click; [ASSERT] verify click has no effect or shows explanation
Assertions: [DOM] 'Return' button absent or disabled on expired-window order; [DOM] expiry message or tooltip visible explaining return window has passed; [STATE] no return request can be initiated for expired order; [DOM] recent deliverable orders still show active 'Return' button for comparison
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] order detail returns returnEligible=false or return window metadata; [CONSOLE] no errors on expired order detail; [NETWORK] no return creation request sent for expired order
Failure_Signals: 'Return' button active on expired-window order allowing submission; no message about return window expiry; return request accepted for order past return window

Title: Invoice PDF - Content Contains Correct Order Data
Preconditions: Buyer logged in as {{USER_EMAIL}}; completed order exists with known order number and items and totals; invoice PDF download available
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to /account/orders; [ACT] click on a completed order; [KEY] note order number and item names and quantities and grand total; [ACT] click 'Download Invoice'; [WAIT] wait for PDF to download; [ASSERT] verify PDF file downloads successfully (non-zero file size); [ASSERT] verify PDF is openable (not corrupted); [ASSERT] verify order number in PDF matches the order; [ASSERT] verify line items in PDF match order items; [ASSERT] verify grand total in PDF matches order total
Assertions: [NETWORK] PDF response Content-Type = application/pdf and Content-Length > 0; [MANUAL] order number present in PDF content; [MANUAL] line items listed in PDF with product names and quantities; [MATH] grand total in PDF = order grand total on storefront; [MANUAL] PDF includes date and company information
Cross_Layer_Checks: [NETWORK] PDF download response Content-Type = application/pdf; [NETWORK] Content-Length > 0; [CONSOLE] no JS errors on download initiation
Failure_Signals: PDF file corrupted or 0 bytes; order number missing from PDF; line items absent from PDF; grand total in PDF does not match order total

Title: Invoice PDF - Multiple Document Types Available
Preconditions: Buyer logged in as {{USER_EMAIL}}; completed order exists; store configured with multiple document types (invoice and packing slip)
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to /account/orders; [ACT] click on a completed order; [WAIT] wait for detail page; [ASSERT] verify document download section shows multiple options (e.g. 'Invoice' and 'Packing Slip'); [ACT] download Invoice PDF; [ASSERT] verify invoice downloads successfully; [ACT] download Packing Slip PDF; [ASSERT] verify packing slip downloads successfully; [ASSERT] verify the two documents have different content (invoice includes prices and packing slip may not)
Assertions: [DOM] multiple document type options visible on order detail; [DOM] each document type has its own download button or link; [STATE] both downloads complete successfully with non-zero file size; [FORMAT] invoice includes pricing data; [FORMAT] packing slip focuses on items and shipping info
Cross_Layer_Checks: [NETWORK] each download returns 2xx with Content-Type application/pdf; [CONSOLE] no errors on multiple downloads; [NETWORK] both files have Content-Length > 0
Failure_Signals: only one document type available when multiple configured; second download fails; both documents contain identical content; document type selector absent

Title: Invoice PDF - Download Without Page Navigation
Preconditions: Buyer logged in as {{USER_EMAIL}}; completed order with invoice available
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to /account/orders; [ACT] click on a completed order; [WAIT] wait for detail page; [ACT] click 'Download Invoice'; [ASSERT] verify download starts without navigating away from order detail page; [ASSERT] verify order detail page remains fully visible and functional after download; [ASSERT] verify no full-page redirect occurs; [ASSERT] verify download progress or completion indicator shown (browser download bar)
Assertions: [STATE] page URL unchanged after download click (no navigation); [DOM] order detail page content intact after download; [DOM] no blank page or redirect during download; [STATE] download initiated via content-disposition attachment header
Cross_Layer_Checks: [NETWORK] download request uses Content-Disposition: attachment; [CONSOLE] no errors during download; [NETWORK] response status 2xx on download endpoint
Failure_Signals: clicking download navigates away from order detail; page goes blank during download; download opens PDF in same tab instead of downloading; page content lost after download

Title: Order Cancellation - Cancel with Reason Selection
Preconditions: Buyer logged in as {{USER_EMAIL}}; order in 'New' status; cancellation enabled; reason selection available
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to /account/orders; [ACT] click on a 'New' order; [ACT] click 'Cancel Order'; [WAIT] wait for cancel dialog; [ASSERT] verify cancellation reason dropdown with predefined options present; [ASSERT] verify at least 3 reason options available; [ACT] attempt submit without selecting reason; [ASSERT] verify validation prevents submission; [ACT] select reason 'Changed my mind'; [ACT] submit cancellation; [WAIT] wait for confirmation; [ASSERT] verify status changes to 'Cancelled'; [ASSERT] verify selected reason visible on order detail
Assertions: [DOM] reason dropdown with multiple predefined options; [STATE] submission blocked without reason; [STATE] cancellation succeeds with selected reason; [DOM] reason displayed on cancelled order detail; [DOM] at least 3 reason options in dropdown
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] cancelOrder mutation includes reason field; [CONSOLE] no errors on cancellation; [NETWORK] 2xx on cancel request
Failure_Signals: reason dropdown absent; cancellation accepted without reason; fewer than 3 reason options; selected reason not persisted or displayed after cancellation

Title: Order Cancellation - Blocked for Partially Shipped Orders
Preconditions: Buyer logged in as {{USER_EMAIL}}; order exists in 'Partially Shipped' status (some items shipped and others pending)
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to /account/orders; [ACT] click on a partially shipped order; [WAIT] wait for detail page; [ASSERT] verify 'Cancel Order' button is absent or disabled; [ASSERT] verify message explains order cannot be cancelled because it has been partially shipped; [ASSERT] verify order status shows 'Partially Shipped'; [ASSERT] verify shipped items section shows shipped items separately from pending items
Assertions: [DOM] 'Cancel Order' button absent or disabled on partially shipped order; [DOM] explanation message visible about partial shipment; [STATE] order status correctly shows 'Partially Shipped'; [DOM] shipped and pending items distinguished in order detail; [DOM] no workaround allows cancellation
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] order detail returns status=PartiallyShipped and cancellation not available; [CONSOLE] no errors on partially shipped order detail; [NETWORK] 2xx on order detail load
Failure_Signals: 'Cancel Order' button active on partially shipped order; no explanation about why cancellation blocked; status incorrect; shipped and pending items not distinguished

Title: Order Cancellation - Triggers Refund Notification
Preconditions: Buyer logged in as {{USER_EMAIL}}; order in 'New' status with payment already authorized/captured; cancellation enabled
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to /account/orders; [ACT] click on a 'New' order with captured payment; [ACT] click 'Cancel Order'; [ACT] select reason and confirm; [WAIT] wait for cancellation confirmation; [ASSERT] verify order status changes to 'Cancelled'; [ASSERT] verify refund notification or message displayed (e.g. 'A refund will be processed'); [ASSERT] verify refund amount mentioned matches order total; [ASSERT] verify no immediate charge visible (refund pending state)
Assertions: [DOM] cancellation confirmation includes refund information; [DOM] refund amount matches order total or captured amount; [STATE] order status = 'Cancelled'; [DOM] refund processing message or timeline displayed; [DOM] payment section shows refund pending or voided state
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] cancelOrder response includes refund information; [CONSOLE] no errors during cancellation with refund; [NETWORK] 2xx on cancel and refund endpoints
Failure_Signals: no refund information shown after cancellation; refund amount incorrect; no indication that payment will be refunded; cancellation succeeds but payment remains in captured state with no refund reference

Title: Order Cancellation - Too Late to Cancel (Processing State)
Preconditions: Buyer logged in as {{USER_EMAIL}}; order exists in 'Processing' status (beyond cancellable window)
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to /account/orders; [ACT] click on order in 'Processing' status; [WAIT] wait for detail page; [ASSERT] verify 'Cancel Order' button absent or disabled; [ASSERT] verify message indicates order is being processed and cannot be cancelled; [ASSERT] verify contact support option or link available for cancellation requests; [ASSERT] verify order status correctly shows 'Processing'
Assertions: [DOM] 'Cancel Order' button absent or disabled on Processing order; [DOM] message explaining cancellation not available at this stage; [DOM] support contact information or link provided; [STATE] order status = 'Processing'; [DOM] no hidden workaround to force cancellation
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] order detail returns cancellable=false for Processing status; [CONSOLE] no errors on Processing order detail; [NETWORK] 2xx on order detail load
Failure_Signals: cancel button active on Processing order; no explanation about why cancellation blocked; no support contact info provided; order allows cancellation despite being in Processing

Title: Order Confirmation - Print Functionality
Preconditions: Buyer just placed a new order; on the order confirmation page; browser supports print dialog
Steps: [NAV] Complete checkout and arrive at order confirmation page; [ASSERT] verify 'Print' button or print icon visible on confirmation page; [ACT] click 'Print' button; [ASSERT] verify browser print dialog invoked (window.print called); [ASSERT] verify print preview shows order details (order number and items and totals); [ASSERT] verify no navigation occurs after closing print dialog; [ASSERT] verify confirmation page still intact after print action
Assertions: [DOM] print button or icon present on order confirmation page; [STATE] clicking print triggers browser print dialog (window.print); [DOM] confirmation page intact after print dialog dismissed; [STATE] no page navigation on print action; [DOM] print-optimized CSS renders clean layout in print preview
Cross_Layer_Checks: [CONSOLE] no JS errors on print action; [NETWORK] no additional requests triggered by print action; [API] no duplicate order creation on print
Failure_Signals: print button absent from confirmation page; clicking print navigates away from page; print dialog not invoked; confirmation page lost after print action

Title: Order Confirmation - Continue Shopping Link
Preconditions: Buyer just placed order; on order confirmation page
Steps: [NAV] Complete checkout and arrive at confirmation page; [ASSERT] verify 'Continue Shopping' link or button visible; [ACT] click 'Continue Shopping'; [WAIT] wait for navigation; [ASSERT] verify navigation to storefront home page or catalog; [ASSERT] verify cart is empty after order placement; [ASSERT] verify no order-related data persists in cart
Assertions: [DOM] 'Continue Shopping' link/button present on confirmation page; [NAV] clicking navigates to home or catalog page; [STATE] cart badge shows 0 items after order; [STATE] cart page shows empty state; [DOM] link text is clear and not ambiguous
Cross_Layer_Checks: [CONSOLE] no JS errors on navigation from confirmation; [NETWORK] 2xx on home/catalog page load; [API] cart query returns empty items after order placement
Failure_Signals: 'Continue Shopping' link absent; link navigates to wrong page; cart still contains ordered items; cart badge shows stale count

Title: Order Confirmation - Order Number Format and Email Reference
Preconditions: Buyer just placed order; on order confirmation page; email notification expected
Steps: [NAV] Complete checkout and arrive at confirmation page; [ASSERT] verify order number displayed in consistent format (e.g. prefix + number); [ASSERT] verify order number matches the format used in /account/orders; [ASSERT] verify confirmation page mentions email notification (e.g. 'A confirmation email has been sent to {{USER_EMAIL}}'); [NAV] navigate to /account/orders; [ASSERT] verify newly placed order appears with same order number; [ASSERT] verify order number in list matches confirmation page exactly
Assertions: [DOM] order number displayed prominently on confirmation page; [FORMAT] order number format consistent with /account/orders format; [DOM] email notification message present referencing buyer email; [STATE] order number in /account/orders matches confirmation; [DOM] order number is not a temporary/placeholder ID
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] GET orders list returns order with matching order number; [CONSOLE] no errors on confirmation page; [NETWORK] 2xx on orders list after placement
Failure_Signals: order number absent from confirmation; order number format differs between confirmation and orders list; no email notification message; order not found in /account/orders after placement

Title: Order Confirmation - All Order Totals Breakdown Displayed
Preconditions: Buyer just placed order with multiple items and shipping and applicable tax
Steps: [NAV] Complete checkout and arrive at confirmation page; [ASSERT] verify subtotal displayed; [ASSERT] verify shipping cost displayed; [ASSERT] verify tax amount displayed; [ASSERT] verify discount amount displayed (if coupon was applied); [ASSERT] verify grand total displayed; [MATH] verify grand total = subtotal + shipping + tax - discount; [ASSERT] verify all amounts show 2 decimal places with currency symbol
Assertions: [MATH] grand total = subtotal + shipping + tax - discount; [FORMAT] all monetary amounts display 2 decimal places; [FORMAT] currency symbol present on all amounts; [DOM] subtotal and shipping and tax and grand total all visible; [DOM] discount line present when coupon applied; [DOM] no hidden or missing total components
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] order detail response totals match confirmation page amounts; [CONSOLE] no errors on confirmation page; [NETWORK] 2xx on confirmation page load
Failure_Signals: subtotal missing from confirmation; shipping cost absent; tax not displayed; grand total does not equal sum of components; amounts missing decimal places or currency symbol
